docs.text: Awesome Tools A curated list of awesome tools for dev, design, and life. Inspired by awesome-python . Awesome Tools Design Frontend Dev Miscellaneous Life Aerial - a very nice Mac screensaver (Yes, it works with recent Mac version that SaveHollywood gave up; so please buy them a coffee) Archive.org-Downloader bilibili-downloader - Bilibili 4K 视频下载 Mousecape - 可莉像素指针 Mac 版 运行工具 scrcpy - Mirroring our Android screens onto our Mac screens and monitors TiddlyDesktop Branding HashiCorp TypeScript Machine Learning MIT Deep Learning Book Llama 2 A comprehensive guide to running Llama 2 locally Ollama Design SVG/LOGO Brandfetch Worldvectorlogo API Stylebook Design Guidelines Frontend Dev Defensive CSS npm trends The Modern JavaScript Tutorial UI Performance Lighthouse CI Action - Maintained by third party, no GitHub App install required, no dedicated UI report hosting server required Lighthouse CI - Maintained by Google, GitHub App install required, UI report hosting requires dedicated server Lighthouse PageSpeed Insights Performance Budget Calculator Request Map Generator Third Party Web Mock Backend json-graphql-server json-server - Quick back-end for prototyping and mocking lowdb - Simple to use type-safe local JSON database Backend Dev API Platform (also checkout this interesting startup ) Generate SQL DB Schema Diagram Java Defensive Copy Java Generics FAQs GraphQL gqt - Build and execute GraphQL queries in the terminal GraphiQL online Language Ancient Greek Language resources on Reddit Textkit Greek and Latin Forums Ancient Greek Ancient Greek Dictionary Hansen and Quinn "Greek an intensive course" A full set of translations for the exercises in all twenty chapters Complementary materials Hansen and Quinn Videos by PlayGreek Partial answer keys for the textbook Miscellaneous Convert curl commands to Python, JavaScript and more Escape / Unescape Tool Greasy Fork - A nice browser per-website customization such as de-流氓 script by Bilibili Online Self-Signed SSL Certificate Generator Tool for Website Random String Generator Unix Time Stamp - Epoch Converter URL Decoder/Encoder Contributing Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first. I will keep some pull requests open if I'm not sure whether those libraries are awesome, you could vote for them by adding :+1: to them. Pull requests will be merged when their votes reach 20 . License The use and distribution terms for awesome-tools are covered by the Apache License, Version 2.0 . If you have any question about this opinionated list, do not hesitate to contact me or open an issue on GitHub.
